question: Chapters
feedback: The text successfully identifies the two main parts (theoretical and practical) and further breaks down the theoretical part into three sub-sections. This provides a clear high-level overview of the chapters.

question: Description
feedback: The text provides a good description of the theoretical parts, but it fails to describe the contents of the practical part. To improve, you should add a sentence explaining what the practical part entails (e.g., the specific simulation process or the results of the analysis).

question: Structure
feedback: The general structure is easy to follow; however, the transition from the theoretical overview to the practical application is abrupt. Strengthening the link between the literature review and the specific case study (Xiaomi arena) would make the structural logic even clearer.
